programs.title: How I Got Here
programs.desc: On a trip to Thailand, Tyler uncovers his mother Diane's vibrant past and her deep culinary roots, while exploring her private connection to Buddhism and bridging the emotional distance left by grief and loss.

programs.title: Deadly Science
programs.sub_title: Long Forgotten Tracks (Percy Fawcett, O.C. Marsh, Edward Drinker Cope, Vavilov)
programs.desc: Some discoveries lie in wait for those brave enough to venture out; from hidden cities in the jungle to dinosaur fossils and seeds in far-flung locales, the prize goes to those willing to take the risk.

programs.title: I Died... And Came Back
programs.desc: A woman experiences multiple near-death experiences in her lifetime, often returning to the place she calls heaven; meanwhile, a man dies mid-workout, and it takes 6 minutes to restart his heart when he experiences an extradimensional place.

programs.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programs.desc: Six gliders drop from the skies near Cabourg in a surprise attack to take Pegasus Bridge over the One River; securing the bridge is a crucial step in protecting a north flank invasion.

programs.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programs.desc: Jordyn and Johnny get a tour from a fellow paranormal investigator, who has a couple tales of her own; it comes to their attention that a former prisoner hung himself in the jail when doing an interview with a former employee.

programs.title: Believe
programs.desc: Buddhism focuses on the understanding that to live is to suffer; Buddhist practices aspire to transcend this state of suffering and achieve true understanding; traversing sacred sites and learning about ancient practices that guide followers.
